euler-dao.name: Euler DAO
euler-dao.description: Euler DAO is responsible for the governance of the Euler protocol.

re7-labs.name: Re7 Labs
re7-labs.description: Re7 Labs is a third-party curator using Euler infrastructure to configure onchain vaults and lending markets. The curator is responsible for asset selection, vault parameter configuration, and management of the vaults it configures.

apostro.name: Apostro
apostro.description: Apostro is a third-party curator using Euler infrastructure to configure markets with a focus on oracle-risk management. The curator is responsible for asset selection, vault parameter configuration, and management of the vaults it configures.

alterscope.name: Alterscope
alterscope.description: Alterscope is a third-party curator using Euler infrastructure to configure markets informed by risk modeling and monitoring tools. The curator is responsible for asset selection, vault parameter configuration, and management of the vaults it configures.

cozy-finance.name: Cozy Finance
cozy-finance.description: Cozy Finance is a third-party curator using Euler infrastructure to configure markets using modular onchain risk infrastructure. The curator is responsible for asset selection, vault parameter configuration, and management of the vaults it configures.

idle.name: Idle DAO
idle.description: Idle DAO is a third-party curator using Euler infrastructure to configure vaults connected to automated DeFi allocation strategies. The curator is responsible for asset selection, vault parameter configuration, and management of the vaults it configures.

mev-capital.name: MEV Capital
mev-capital.description: MEV Capital is a third-party curator using Euler infrastructure to configure vaults across selected DeFi markets. The curator is responsible for asset selection, vault parameter configuration, and management of the vaults it configures.

k3.name: K3 Capital
k3.description: K3 Capital is a third-party curator using Euler infrastructure to configure vaults across selected DeFi markets. The curator is responsible for asset selection, vault parameter configuration, and management of the vaults it configures.

swaap-labs.name: Swaap labs
swaap-labs.description: Swaap Labs is a third-party curator using Euler infrastructure to configure markets with a focus on onchain financial primitives. The curator is responsible for asset selection, vault parameter configuration, and management of the vaults it configures.

tulipa-capital.name: Tulipa Capital
tulipa-capital.description: Tulipa Capital is a third-party curator using Euler infrastructure to configure vaults across selected DeFi strategies. The curator is responsible for asset selection, vault parameter configuration, and management of the vaults it configures.

usual.description: Usual is a DeFi protocol using Euler infrastructure to configure markets connected to the USD0 ecosystem.

ouroboros-capital.name: Ouroboros Capital
ouroboros-capital.description: Ouroboros Capital is a third-party curator using Euler infrastructure to configure vaults across selected DeFi lending strategies. The curator is responsible for asset selection, vault parameter configuration, and management of the vaults it configures.

zerolend.name: ZeroLend
zerolend.description: ZeroLend is a third-party curator using Euler infrastructure to configure lending markets for selected asset categories. The curator is responsible for asset selection, vault parameter configuration, and management of the vaults it configures.

keyring.name: Keyring
keyring.description: Keyring provides identity and access-control infrastructure that may be used to configure permissioned market access on Euler.

clearstar.description: Clearstar is a third-party curator using Euler infrastructure to configure vaults across selected decentralized markets. The curator is responsible for asset selection, vault parameter configuration, and management of the vaults it configures.

tidcapital.description: TID Capital is a third-party curator using Euler infrastructure to configure markets informed by DeFi research. The curator is responsible for asset selection, vault parameter configuration, and management of the vaults it configures.

sentora.name: Sentora

hyperithm.description: Hyperithm is a third-party curator using Euler infrastructure to configure markets involving selected collateral assets. The curator is responsible for asset selection, vault parameter configuration, and management of the vaults it configures.

9summits.description: 9 Summits is a third-party curator using Euler infrastructure to configure vaults across selected DeFi markets. The curator is responsible for asset selection, vault parameter configuration, and management of the vaults it configures.

tau-labs.description: TAU Labs is a third-party curator using Euler infrastructure to configure markets informed by risk and mechanism-design work. The curator is responsible for asset selection, vault parameter configuration, and management of the vaults it configures.

securitize.name: Securitize
securitize.description: Securitize is a tokenisation platform for real-world assets, providing issuer-governed collateral vaults that preserve transfer restrictions and enable tokenised RWAs to be used as collateral on Euler.
